message:
fix: mergeQueryResults now propagates all telemetry from partials

Previously only bytesRead, pagesSkipped, and durationMs were merged.
Now propagates r2ReadMs, wasmExecMs (max — parallel execution),
cacheHits, cacheMisses, edgeCacheHits, edgeCacheMisses (summed),
and spillBytesWritten, spillBytesRead (summed). Fields are omitted
when no partials report them.
